stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP696 Figure 2.5.
Given a mass of 2600 lbs, determine the rear and forward limits for the CG positions.

options.a: Rear 87.7 in, forward 82.3 in aft of datum.
options.b: Rear 78.3 in, forward 87.7 in aft of datum.
options.c: Rear 87.7 in, forward 74.0 in aft of datum.
options.d: Rear 74.0 in, forward 87.7 in aft of datum.
